race.description: Jeffrey Dunn Qtis Three-Year-Old Mdn Hcp
race.comment: QUEEN JEDDAH (4) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in three of six starts to date and strikes a very winnable contest here. Wasn't disgraced in Saturday metro grade last time out and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Bold showing expected. GOLDEN EYES (11) has placed over this distance range and will strip fitter second-up from the spell. Respect from the Bruce yard. OVEROPTOMYSTIC (2) just ran into one better at Warwick on debut and will have taken a lot of benefit from that race day experience. In the mix. ENTERPRISE GISELLE (8) gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim and looks to be improving with racing. Include in calculations. I SAY I SAY (3) next in line.
